name: emitc-source-authority-owner
title: EmitC Source Authority Owner
description: Make typed extension family ops materialize through the common EmitC route so MLIR EmitC source authority, not descriptor/direct custom C export, owns production generated source.
creator: codex
notes: Removed the legacy route-to-C renderer API and implementation so conversion/EmitC exposes only MLIR EmitC materialization and MLIR Cpp source-authority source emission for lowerable routes.
